op.text: Priya: Conflict as of 2025-04-27 — Priya asked to borrow $8,000 for ceramics studio lease deposit and buildout; Dana said no immediately and 'badly,' citing uncertain finances (Austin decision pending) and past experience lending to ex; Priya went 'very quiet and then very polite'; have skipped pottery class twice in nearly two weeks since; Dana describes it as delivering 'ten years of friendship a verdict in four seconds'
[as of 2025-04-27] Walking boot comes off 2025-04-30; physical therapy to start after; orthopedist said ankle healing on schedule

Needs to repair relationship with Priya after conflict over loan request; Dana wants to address 'how I gave it' separately from the loan decision itself, but feels it's 'too raw' as of 2025-04-27; pottery class attendance has lapsed

op.note: Sam's decision deadline now described as 'due in a week' from 2025-04-27 (approximately early May, consistent with earlier 'early May 2025' timeline); financial uncertainty from this decision was cited as factor in declining Priya's loan request
